items.title: King Charles should meet Epstein victims, US lawmaker says
items.dek: While the trip is not officially confirmed, the King and Queen Camilla are reportedly planning to visit the US at the end of April.
items.body: While the trip is not officially confirmed, the King and Queen Camilla are reportedly planning to visit the US at the end of April.

items.title: 'A succulent Chinese meal' - iconic Australian quote immortalised in national archive
items.dek: The theatrical monologue given by Jack Karlson as he was arrested in 1991 has been officially recognised as a "lasting piece of cultural folklore".
items.body: The theatrical monologue given by Jack Karlson as he was arrested in 1991 has been officially recognised as a "lasting piece of cultural folklore".
